name: ebay-fulfillment
description: Reads eBay seller orders, exploded line items, shipping fulfillments, and payment disputes through the eBay Sell Fulfillment REST API.

risk.read: external eBay Sell Fulfillment API read of a seller's order, shipment, and dispute data

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); conformance's synthetic config overrides token_url with the non-URL literal "synthetic-conformance-value" (runtimeConfigForEngine ignores spec.json defaults), which the AuthHook's validateHTTPSURL correctly rejects (SSRF hardening) -- every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively on this synthetic-config artifact, not a real bundle defect. Matches gmail's identical documented skip_dynamic shape (same mode:custom, same synthetic-token_url clash). Correctness of the AuthHook's refresh-token exchange and the StreamHook's order_line_items/shipping_fulfillments explosion is a direct, field-for-field port of internal/connectors/ebay-fulfillment's own tested behavior (auth.go's refreshTokenAuth, streams.go's lineItemRecord/shippingFulfillmentRecord); a dedicated hooks_test.go/paritytest/ebay-fulfillment suite is recommended follow-up (docs.md Known limits) but out of scope for this JSON+docs.md migration pass.
